name: Abdelrahman Alaa Eldeen
title: Data Scientist & Software Engineer
bio: Software Engineer and Data Scientist with 2 years of experience across data platforms and backend systems. Over one year in software engineering at Bussma (Jadara Solutions), contributing to BUDG — a closed-source enterprise data governance application for metadata, policies, and operational workflows. Strong in Python, SQL, and Java (Jakarta Servlets, Elasticsearch, MySQL), plus cloud work on AWS and Azure, with a focus on scalable pipelines, logging, and turning complex data into business value.
shortBio: I build intelligent backends, data platforms, and automation tools that turn raw data into real business impact.
